title: Vietnamese-Style Shrimp Pho
description: A twist on the classic Vietnamese noodle soup, featuring succulent shrimp and a rich, flavorful broth.
instructions: Bring 4 cups of water to a boil in a large pot.
Add 1 tablespoon of smoke-infused fish sauce and stir to combine.
Add the shrimp and cook for 2-3 minutes, until pink and cooked through.
Remove the shrimp from the pot and set aside.
Add 2 cups of pho noodles to the pot and cook according to package instructions.
Strain the noodles and add them to a bowl with the cooked shrimp.
In a small pan, heat 1 teaspoon of briny fish sauce over medium heat.
Add 1 teaspoon of cold-pressed rice vinegar and stir to combine.
Pour the sauce over the noodles and shrimp.
Sprinkle crispy shallots and chopped scallions over the top.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
